description_long: This kiosk features a tall, vertically oriented structure with a rounded top and a sturdy circular base. The frame is outlined in a vivid red color, while the main panels are a smooth light gray, giving it a modern and eye-catching appearance. The front panel displays a printed logo and text, suggesting its use for advertising or informational purposes, with the branding 'PlastiKub' and additional Russian text. The kiosk is open on the sides, supported by two vertical posts that connect the top arch to the base, leaving the interior accessible but not enclosed. The base is wide and flat, providing stability, and the overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with no visible windows or doors. The materials appear to be primarily plastic or composite, suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, freestanding kiosk with a rounded top, red frame, and printed signage on a light gray panel, supported by a circular base. The design is open-sided and minimalistic, ideal for advertising or information display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the printed logo and text on the main panel, framed by a red border and supported by a circular base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the kiosk, with the red frame and circular base visible but no signage or panel details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel, red frame, and base, with no signage or branding visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim structure and circular base without any signage.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign with logo and text, placed on the front main panel
attribute_roof_design: arched top, continuous with the frame, no overhangs or decorative elements
